sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24051" key="dendrotro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δενδρο-τρόφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n24051.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rearing trees,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄρη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:31:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
